headline: Honeywell Aerospace Spin Off Plans Reframe Valuation And Risk Outlook
summary: Honeywell International plans to spin off its Aerospace division into a standalone, publicly traded company called Honeywell Aerospace. The company has begun substantial financing activity, including private notes and new credit facilities, to fund and execute the separation. The separation is intended to reshape Honeywell's business profile and create a more focused Aerospace entity for public investors. For investors watching NasdaqGS:HON, this move comes as the stock trades around...
